name: toughtongue-skills
description: Skills and MCP server for Tough Tongue AI — the platform for tough conversations. Some, the AI takes: voice agents that call, demo, screen, and book. Others, you nail: realistic roleplay for negotiations, interviews, and coaching. Create agents, refine them from real transcripts, and analyze sessions from your coding agent.

plugins.name: toughtongue
plugins.description: Build, refine, and analyze Tough Tongue AI voice agents — automate tough conversations or practice them — through the Tough Tongue MCP server. Includes scenario-creator, scenario-refiner, and session-analyst skills.
